name: onebrain
description: Knowledge harvesting and ingestion workflows for OneBrain.

interface.longDescription: OneBrain adds skills and tooling for scanning repositories, wikis, Jira, and Azure DevOps into structured knowledge packs that can be ingested by OneBrain.
defaultPrompt: Harvest this repository into a OneBrain knowledge pack.
Scan Azure DevOps and Jira into OneBrain.
Create repository metadata for OneBrain ingestion.
